# Celestial Longevity
## Scripture
"The earth will be filled with the knowledge of the Lord's glory, like the water covers the sea." - Habakkuk 2:14

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the night sky, we're reminded of the celestial bodies that have been in existence for millions of years. The stars, planets, and galaxies have been shining bright, untouched by the passage of time. This longevity is a testament to God's infinite power and eternal nature. In Habakkuk 2:14, we're promised that one day, the earth will be filled with the knowledge of God's glory, just like the oceans cover the sea. This verse encourages us to trust in God's plan, even when we can't see the full picture.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the celestial wonders, we're reminded of Your eternal nature and infinite power. Help us to trust in Your plan, even when the journey ahead seems uncertain. Fill us with the knowledge of Your glory, just like the oceans cover the sea. May our hearts be filled with wonder, our minds be filled with awe, and our spirits be filled with the promise of Your eternal presence. Amen.
